typography.font_import_instruction: Import Marcellus and Allura from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Allura&family=Marcellus&display=swap');

visual_blueprint.description: Full viewport height. Ivory paper texture background. A premium golden envelope centered on screen. Features a gold wax seal with a subtle shimmering animation. 'Pull to Open' hint.
Revealed inside/after envelope opens. Elegant presentation of 'Aswathy ♡ Sanjay' using the Allura font. Surrounded by subtle rose gold floral accents.
Contains a Malayalam mantra accent (e.g. 'മാംഗല്യം' / 'Mangalyam' or 'Sreeragam') in subtle gold font, followed by an emotional invitation in English.
Interactive scratch card area. Covered with a gold foil texture. User scratches (swipes/drags) to reveal '21 August 2026'. Upon 50% reveal, triggers a floral/petal confetti burst.
Four minimal circular or vertical counters (Days, Hours, Minutes, Seconds) with rose gold borders and gold digits.
Information block for 'Kunnathoor Devi Temple, Kuttamperoor'. Includes time (10:00 am - 10:15 am). Styled with an elegant Google Maps CTA button.
Fixed bottom-right circular button with a vinyl or music note icon. Spins slowly when music is playing. Controls the uploaded Sreeragamo violin track.
Minimalist ivory footer with 'Share the Love' section containing WhatsApp share and copy link buttons.

micro_interactions.envelope_drag: Use framer-motion drag='y' on the flap. Map the drag Y offset to rotateX (0 to 180 degrees upwards). When fully open, scale down the envelope slightly, fade it out, and slide up the letter content.
micro_interactions.golden_shimmer: Apply a CSS mask-image or linear-gradient with background-position animation (-200% to 200%) over the wax seal SVG to create a looping shine effect.
micro_interactions.scratch_mechanic: Use an HTML5 <canvas> overlay over the date. On touchmove/mousemove, draw transparent circles (globalCompositeOperation='destination-out'). Calculate transparent pixel percentage. Snap to full transparent at 50%.
micro_interactions.petal_burst: Use canvas-confetti library on date reveal. Configure colors: ['#F1D4D4', '#B76E79', '#D4AF37'], set shapes to circles/ovals (to mimic petals), disable gravity slightly for a floating effect.
micro_interactions.smooth_scroll: Implement Lenis or native smooth scrolling behavior. Add a thin fixed progress bar at the top or subtle scroll-based opacity reveals for sections (framer-motion whileInView).

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all components are strictly mobile-first as this is a digital invitation meant primarily for phones.
Implement the Envelope drag physics securely using framer-motion useMotionValue and useTransform.
For the scratch card, ensure touch events call e.preventDefault() if necessary to avoid scrolling the page while scratching.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='envelope-flap', data-testid='bgm-toggle', data-testid='map-button').
Do NOT use pure white (#FFFFFF) or pure black (#000000). Use the provided Ivory and Charcoal/Olive colors to maintain the Luxury light archetype.
Add lucide-react or react-icons for UI elements (music, play/pause, map, share).
Install framer-motion and canvas-confetti (yarn add framer-motion canvas-confetti).
Set background music audio element to loop, but require an explicit user interaction (like the envelope open or BGM button click) to start playing to comply with browser auto-play policies.
